title: Assistant Store Manager - Bikanervala - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Bikanervala - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Bikanervala is actively seeking a talented and motivated Assistant Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Chennai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Bikanervala:
Bikanervala is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bikanervala!
